zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Eschenbach於大約1146年出生在瑞士爾利望根-布盧迪瑟倫望根時，她的父親Walter I. von Eschenbach22歲，母親Adelheid von Geroldseck33歲。她和Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1249年在巴登阿赤 斯陶分哈特海姆費爾德吉其享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Eschenbach于大约1146年出生在瑞士爾利望根-布盧迪瑟倫望根时，她的父亲Walter I. von Eschenbach22岁，母亲Adelheid von Geroldseck33岁。她和Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1249年在巴登阿赤 斯陶分哈特海姆費爾德吉其享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eschenbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Eschenbacher
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Eschenbach  .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Eschenbach was born about 1146, in Wangen, Wangen-Brüttisellen, Zürich, Switzerland, her father, Walter I. von Eschenbach, was 22 and her mother, Adelheid von Geroldseck, was 33. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis. She died in 1249, in Feldkirch, Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, at the age of 104.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Feldkirch, Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, à l’âge de 104 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Eschenbach è nata il circa 1146 nel Wangen, Wangen-Brüttisellen, Zurigo, Svizzera, sua padre, Walter I. von Eschenbach, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Geroldseck, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis. Morì nel 1249, nel Feldkirch, Hartheim, Amt Staufen, Baden, all'età di 104 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Eschenbach(이)가 대략 1146년 스위스 즈u리치 왕-브u티셀렌 왕에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter I. von Eschenbach(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Geroldseck(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 바든 아트 스타펜 하테임 펠드커치에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Eschenbach родилась около 1146 г. в местности ванген, ванген-брuттиселлен, зuрич, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Walter I. von Eschenbach было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Geroldseck, 33. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Albero I von Wangen und Burgeis. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности фелдкирч, хартим, амт стауфен, баден в возрасте 104 лет.
